Our Services

Our IT Project Management services include proper planning and implementation. We possess an effective proven strategy for all stages of a project that guarantees success.

🖥️

System Management

Full IT asset management and software licensing for both simple and enterprise software development, reducing cost and human effort.

Learn More →
🌐

Network Solutions

Planning and installation of structured cables, servers, server operating systems, and directory plans.

Learn More →
💻

Web Solutions

Professional website development, hosting, e-mail services, database-driven solutions, and SEO to grow your online presence.

Learn More →
🔧

Technical Support

Desktop and notebook support, computer configuration, VPN solutions, and IT outsourcing to boost operational efficiency.

Learn More →
🛡️

AML System

Powerful API integration to automate AML control processes, reduce workload, and fulfill compliance obligations without delay.

Learn More →
📋

D-Biz Programme

Government-backed Distance Business Programme to help enterprises adopt IT solutions and expand their digital operations.

Learn More →

Why Choose PEP?

Since 1997, PEP has been developing business systems to enhance operations across education, medicine, and commerce.

We provide open-resource, user-friendly relational database solutions on web, app, and Windows platforms. Beyond R&D, we offer application software, technical support, data integration, training, and customisations.
